codeReview.summary: The implementation correctly introduces a delta-vision mechanism by caching the last sent frame and comparing sampled pixels (every 4th pixel) with a threshold to reduce redundant data transfer. The approach correctly compares against the last sent frame, ensuring incremental visual changes will eventually trigger an update.

summary: Delta-vision feature correctly implemented to drop redundant frames, successfully checking visual delta threshold.
